api_key.description: Spotler CRM API key, sent as the X-API-Key header value. Never logged. Used only by the legacy-parity contacts/accounts/opportunities/tasks streams; see access_token for the real CRM API v4's own OAuth2 access token, required by every other stream this bundle declares.

access_token.description: Spotler CRM (Really Simple Systems) API v4 OAuth2 access token, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <access_token>). Never logged. Preferred over api_key when both are present; required by every stream added in this pass (activities, campaigns, cases, documents, opportunity_lines) since those target the real, live CRM API v4 host directly.

base_url.description: Spotler CRM API base URL override for tests or proxies. Only affects the legacy-parity contacts/accounts/opportunities/tasks streams; every other stream targets the real CRM API v4 host directly (https://apiv4.reallysimplesystems.com) and does not consult this value — see docs.md's Known limits.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
